sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂטן

Transliteration: śâṭân

Phonetic: saw-tawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. adversary, one who withstands
    1. adversary (in general - personal or national)
  2. superhuman adversary
    1. Satan (as noun proper)

Origin: from H7853

TWOT entry: 2252a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
